---
title: Privacy Statement
---
This site adheres to the [Privacy Statement of Vrije Universiteit Amsterdam](https://vu.nl/en/about-vu/more-about/privacy-statement-vrije-universiteit-amsterdam).

This site uses [Umami](https://umami.is) to gather site visitor statistics. This system does not use Cookies, but does assign each visitor a temporary unique ID to track users within the rdm.vu.nl site. This data is stored on VU campus and is not shared with third parties.
